I'm Anastasia Petrova, a Data Analyst and self-taught UX and Graphic Designer 🚀 from Moscow, Russia.

![Coding](https://cdn.dribbble.com/users/2704414/screenshots/7466903/media/b08ab576316bd4582fef189f471cd9e5.gif)
